'''Ahug''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] covered in oceans of molten metal. It was the innermost planet in the [[Kriekaal system/Legends|Kriekaal system]].

{{Planet-stub}}
